messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0013",
  "title": "游戏玩法越重度则iOS端素材创意占比越高，主流渠道Android素材占比大部分在70%以上",
  "page_index": 14,
  "page_range": "14-15"
}

Section text:
游戏玩法越重度则 iOS端素材创意占比越高，主流渠道 Android 素材占比大部分在 70%以上2025年 全球手游 各系统素材观察
Source ：广大大，根据后台抓取后数据整理后展现
Date Range ：2025/1~2025/12iOS
22.7%
Android
77.3%各系统手游素材占比
14

message.content:
This section addresses 2025 global mobile game advertising creative distribution by operating system. It can answer retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** The positive correlation between heavier game gameplay and increased iOS creative asset share; the observation that mainstream advertising channels typically allocate over 70% of creatives to Android.
- **Metrics & Figures:** Exact global asset proportions (iOS: 22.7%, Android: 77.3%), visualized in a chart on page 14.
- **Entities & Scope:** Global mobile games, iOS, Android, and mainstream ad channels.
- **Dates:** Full-year coverage from January to December 2025.
- **Evidence & Source:** Industry data scraped, processed, and published by the analytics platform 广大大.
Ideal for queries on mobile ad creative allocation trends, platform-specific marketing strategies, gameplay-driven ad planning, and 2025 gaming industry advertising metrics.

response_text:
This section addresses 2025 global mobile game advertising creative distribution by operating system. It can answer retrieval queries regarding:
- **Topics & Claims:** The positive correlation between heavier game gameplay and increased iOS creative asset share; the observation that mainstream advertising channels typically allocate over 70% of creatives to Android.
- **Metrics & Figures:** Exact global asset proportions (iOS: 22.7%, Android: 77.3%), visualized in a chart on page 14.
- **Entities & Scope:** Global mobile games, iOS, Android, and mainstream ad channels.
- **Dates:** Full-year coverage from January to December 2025.
- **Evidence & Source:** Industry data scraped, processed, and published by the analytics platform 广大大.
Ideal for queries on mobile ad creative allocation trends, platform-specific marketing strategies, gameplay-driven ad planning, and 2025 gaming industry advertising metrics.
